---
title: "Korea's Public Diplomacy"
date: 2016-12
author:
  - name: Kadir Jun Ayhan
    url: https://kjayhan.github.io
    orcid: 0000-0001-8052-1938
    affiliation: Ewha Womans University Graduate School of International Studies
categories: [public diplomacy, Korea, 2016]
pub-info:
  reference: >-
    <strong>Kadir Jun Ayhan*</strong> (2016), <em>Korea’s Public Diplomacy</em>, Hangang Network <a href="https://www.researchgate.net/publication/318492917_Korea's_Public_Diplomacy"><code>link</code></a>
#image:
#draft: true
---

## Information

I organized a graduate student conference/ article contest with support (grant) from Ministry of Foreign Affairs. Then, I collected the articles in this volume.

## BibTeX citation

``` bibtex
@book{ayhan_koreas_2016,
	location = {Seoul},
	title = {Korea's Public Diplomacy},
	url = {https://www.researchgate.net/publication/318492917_Korea's_Public_Diplomacy},
	publisher = {Hangang Network},
	author = {Ayhan, Kadir Jun},
	date = {2016},
	note = {Type: Edited Book},
}
```
